title: How do the Evas activate even when they run out of power
display_title: How do the Evas activate even when they run out of power
wikitext:
[]: How do the Evas activate even when they run out of power?             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Mon Nov 29, 2010 6:27 pm Forgive me if this has been mentioned before, but I don't understand how the Evas reactivate even when their energy supply is depleted. If they need electricity to work, how to they magically start working again when the power runs out? I read here (or something, search didn't work too well) that the Evas need the electricity because they can't metabolize on their own, so does that mean that they suddenly metabolize on their own if they need to? Or does it have something to do with the soul of the Eva awakening? Any input is appreciated.

[]:             Quote Post by DoubleZeva » Mon Nov 29, 2010 6:39 pm One theory might be that they don't actually need power to move, just to move under control. A Berzerking Eva is moving by itself and thus needs no power. Another is that high sync ratios (such as those experienced in berzerker mode) emulate an s2 organ temporary. The most reasonable assumption however is probably that the Evas' Cells store there own reserves of biological energy (ATP, Glucose, ect) that are not accounted for by the man-made control systems, but allow them to move themselves. The Batteries/Cable normally supplies energy to the Eva's tissue directly, but not all of this is used however and some of it is stored in it's cells, and used when Berzerking. tl;dr? It's biotech, I don't have to explain shit.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Mon Nov 29, 2010 6:47 pm I see...so the Evas are basically giant, organic batteries. The one thing that I thought, though, is since the Evas are copies of Adam (or Lilith), wouldn't they be made of particle wave-matter, just like the Angels, therefore have no cells? Correct me if I'm wrong. Oh, here's where I saw the metabolism thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Nov 29, 2010 6:51 pm AshPhoenix wrote: The one thing that I thought, though, is since the Evas are copies of Adam (or Lilith), wouldn't they be made of particle wave-matter, just like the angels, therefore have no cells? Correct me if I'm wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Tue Nov 30, 2010 4:37 am didn't the evas have their original s2 organs removed. possibly they still retain some of this ability.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Nov 30, 2010 11:45 am TheLobe wrote: didn't the evas have their original s2 organs removed. possibly they still retain some of this ability.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Nov 30, 2010 3:31 pm So did Eva-01 ever actually use her S2 organ to move on her own, or was it for the sole purpose of Instrumentality?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Nov 30, 2010 3:35 pm AshPhoenix wrote: So did Eva-01 ever actually use its S2 organ to move on its own, or was it for the sole purpose of Instrumentality?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Dec 02, 2010 4:44 pm So how does eating the angel allow the Eva to suddenly grow an S2 organ...?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 02, 2010 4:50 pm AshPhoenix wrote: So how does eating the angel allow the Eva to suddenly grow an S2 organ...?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Dec 02, 2010 6:39 pm What would NGE do without PWM?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Dec 02, 2010 6:50 pm AshPhoenix wrote: What would NGE do without PWM?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 02, 2010 7:32 pm AshPhoenix wrote: What would NGE do without PWM?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Dec 02, 2010 7:36 pm Azathoth wrote: Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Dec 03, 2010 5:09 am The power is only used for the restraints NERV placed on them, Evas can move on their own, bearing disastrous results.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Dec 03, 2010 5:45 am it's symbolic shit, it's not ment to be rational

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Fri Dec 03, 2010 4:52 pm Imo the time limit is all about control. We know that an Eva's armor serves to allow Nerv to control it. Thus the battery allows Nerv to remain in control of the Eva. Once the Eva goes silent(loses power) the only way for the Eva to move is to go berserk. For the most part, Nerv wants to avoid that(although it does factor into Gendo's plans).

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Fri Dec 03, 2010 7:17 pm Grimmjow wrote: Imo the time limit is all about control. We know that an Eva's armor serves to allow Nerv to control it. Thus the battery allows Nerv to remain in control of the Eva.

[]: Re: How do the Evas activate even when they run out of power             Quote Post by Assasinate » Tue Dec 07, 2010 7:34 am AshPhoenix wrote: Forgive me if this has been mentioned before, but I don't understand how the Evas reactivate even when their energy supply is depleted. If they need electricity to work, how to they magically start working again when the power runs out? I read here (or something, search didn't work too well) that the Evas need the electricity because they can't metabolize on their own, so does that mean that they suddenly metabolize on their own if they need to? Or does it have something to do with the soul of the Eva awakening? Any input is appreciated.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Dec 07, 2010 5:08 pm The third is the same as the first, and the second only applies to Rebuild.
